a11y.introModal: Adjust the site display to your preference. Your choices are saved in this browser.
a11y.fonteDesc: Increase or decrease the text size across the site.
a11y.contrasteDesc: Increases color contrast for better readability.
a11y.temaDesc: Switches the display to a dark background theme.
a11y.dislexiaDesc: Replaces the typography with an easier-to-read font.
a11y.atalho2: Close menus, modals and the mobile menu
cookie.bannerText: We use cookies. We use essential cookies and, with your consent, performance and personalization cookies to improve your experience. Learn more in our Privacy Policy.
cookie.modalIntro: Choose which categories of cookies you allow. Essential cookies cannot be disabled as they are required for the platform to function.
cookie.essenciaisDesc: Required for login, security and basic platform functionality.
cookie.desempenhoDesc: Help us understand how visitors use the platform so we can continuously improve it.
cookie.funcionalidadeDesc: Remember preferences such as language, region and font size.
cookie.analiseDesc: Used in aggregate to understand platform usage trends.
herosearch.placeholder: E.g.: Drip rate, Braden Scale, Insulin, NCP...
seo.h1: Nursing Calculators, Practice Exams and Clinical Scales
seo.desc: A complete platform with nursing calculators, clinical scales, medication dosage calculations and practice exams for public exams. Ideal for students, technicians and nurses who want to optimize daily practice, strengthen patient safety and prepare for exams.
sol.titulo: Solutions for every moment of your practice
sol.desc: Clinical tools, protocols, scales and educational content for students, nurses, managers and healthcare institutions — with digital accountability and measurable impact.
sol.card1.desc: Translated into more than 18 languages, covering over 140 countries.
sol.card2.desc: Over 60 automated clinical and care scales.
sol.card3.desc: Over 15 care calculators to solve everyday calculations in the profession.
sol.card4.desc: Interactive practice exams from leading exam boards, organized by topic with time and score tracking.
sol.card5.desc: A growing collection serving as an exclusive base of nursing literature content.
sol.card6.desc: A commitment to education through the development of exclusive literary content.
sol.card7.desc: Credit to literature and use of bibliographic references to guide scales and content.
sol.card8.desc: Information protection and data governance across all platform tools.
quick.desc: Access validated calculators and resources that make your daily routine easier.
edu.desc: Up-to-date, evidence-based content developed by experts.
edu.list3: Practice exams by board and institution
gestao.desc: Resources and indicators to support healthcare leaders and institutions.
tool.gestacional.desc: Calculate gestational age and estimated due date.
tool.notificacao-compulsoria.desc: Interactive list of the Ministry of Health's notifiable diseases and conditions.
tool.sbar.desc: Digital SBAR form for nurses — fill in and print.
tool.calculo-de-ferias.desc: How much will you receive for vacation?
tool.adicional-noturno.desc: Calculate the value of your night shift differential.
tool.calculo-hora-extra.desc: Calculate the value of your overtime pay.
tool.calculo-rescisao.desc: Calculate the value of your contract termination settlement.
tool.simulado-de-enfermagem.desc: 50 questions from leading exam boards and institutions, with a timer and final percentage score.
tool.simulado-de-enfermagem4.desc: Over 50 new questions from leading exam boards and institutions, with a timer and final percentage score.
tool.simulado-de-enfermagem2.desc: 50 questions from leading exam boards and institutions, with a timer and final percentage score.
tool.simulado-de-enfermagem3.desc: Over 50 new questions from leading exam boards and institutions, with a timer and final percentage score.
tool.simulado-de-enfermagem-nucleo-de-se: 50 questions from the Ministry of Health, IBSP, ANVISA and ISMP, with a timer and final percentage score.
tool.simulado-de-enfermagem-doencas-de-n: 50 questions based on Ordinance GM/MS No. 6,734/2025.
tool.simulado_vacinacao.desc: 30 questions on vaccination (Ministry of Health & SBIM).
tool.simulado_pcr.desc: 30 questions on cardiopulmonary arrest (Exam boards/AHA & SBC).
tool.simulado_bloco-operatorio.desc: 30 questions on the Operating Room (Exam boards/SOBECC/COFEN).
tool.flashcards_quiz.desc: Interactive questions on various nursing topics.
tool.biblioteca-provas.desc: Access a vast collection of nursing exams and exercises.
tool.apache.desc: Severity assessment for critically ill patients.
tool.ballard.desc: Assessment of newborn neuromuscular and physical maturity.
tool.barthel.desc: Assesses the patient's degree of functional dependence.
tool.bps.desc: Pain assessment in mechanically ventilated patients.
tool.berg.desc: Assesses a patient's static and dynamic balance.
tool.bishop.desc: Assesses cervical maturity and readiness for labor.
tool.capurro.desc: Method for estimating newborn gestational age.
tool.cornell.desc: Depression rating in patients with dementia.
tool.downton.desc: Assesses fall risk in elderly patients.
tool.elpo.desc: Pressure injury assessment in the operating room.
tool.hamilton.desc: Assesses the severity of anxiety symptoms.
tool.lachs.desc: Assessment of functional capacity in the elderly.
tool.lawton.desc: Measures the degree of independence in IADLs in the elderly.
tool.manchester.desc: Patient care priority in emergency care units.
tool.meows.desc: Modified early obstetric warning score / assesses clinical deterioration.
tool.news.desc: Adult early warning score / assesses clinical deterioration.
tool.nips.desc: Tool for assessing pain in newborns.
tool.pelod.desc: Early severity and risk in children in the PICU.
tool.pews.desc: Pediatric early warning score / assesses clinical deterioration.
tool.perroca.desc: Patient classification according to care complexity.
tool.rancholosamigos.desc: Cognitive and behavioral patterns in patients with brain injury.
tool.silverman.desc: Degree of respiratory distress in newborns.
tool.tinetti.desc: Assesses fall risk in the elderly by observing gait and balance.
global.desc: We connect professionals, institutions and knowledge across more than 195 countries, promoting stronger, more collaborative and sustainable nursing.
newsletter2.desc: Stay up to date with updates, news and new releases.
newsletter2.consent: I agree to receive email communications and accept the Privacy Policy.
hero.title: Technology and knowledge for more efficient, sustainable nursing.
hero.lead: The Nursing Calculators Global Platform offers tools, content and digital solutions to transform professional practice and generate a positive impact on health.
footer.newsletter-desc: Get exclusive content on nursing, management and health.
footer.brand-desc: Technology and knowledge for more efficient, sustainable nursing.
